emails.subject: FW: New Mexico Power Plant Project
emails.body: FW: New Mexico Power Plant Project Can we contact them to find out about how they plan to get their gas supply? I know Stan will ask me about this one. To: Chavez, Gabriel; Dowd, Stephen; Gadd, Eric; Hyatt, Kevin; Millar, John; Ratner, Michael; Taylor, Gina; Hass, Glen; Loeffler, Michael; Stanton, Lon; Wilson, Rob; Harris, Steven; Donoho, Lindy; Goradia, Pallavi; Lindberg, Lorraine; Lohman, TK; Lokay, Michelle; Moore, Jan; Watson, Kimberly

emails.subject: RE: New Mexico Power Plant Project
emails.body: RE: New Mexico Power Plant Project We are tracking this one down. I'll keep you posted. Kim. To: Watson, Kimberly

emails.subject: FW: New Mexico Power Plant Project
emails.body: Steve, FYI, Kim. To: Watson, Kimberly

emails.subject: FW: New Mexico Power Plant Project
emails.body: Steve, FYI, Kim. To: Watson, Kimberly

emails.subject: RE: New Mexico Power Plant Project
emails.body: Shouldn't we talk to them about sourcing off TW instead of waiting to see who the supplier will be? I would like to be as proactive as possible on this one. Thanks. To: Harris, Steven

emails.subject: RE: New Mexico Power Plant Project
emails.body: Shouldn't we talk to them about sourcing off TW instead of waiting to see who the supplier will be? I would like to be as proactive as possible on this one. Thanks. To: Harris, Steven

emails.subject: RE: New Mexico Power Plant Project
emails.body: Absolutely! We will stay in contact with them. K. To: Watson, Kimberly
